content: Single log file per task, not per subtask. Append-only at .agentboard/logs/{taskId}.log with indented subtask sections. Avoids file explosion. BufferedWriter needed for parallel stages.
Always use execFile (promisified), never exec for shell commands. exec is vulnerable to command injection. execFile passes arguments as array, bypassing shell. Can't use shell features like pipes.

Subtasks are fully autonomous: ready → implement → checks → inline fix → code_quality → done|failed|blocked. No spec, no planning, no PR. Per-subtask code quality review catches issues early. Quality depends on parent spec quality.
ECC rules and learnings installed project-scoped (.claude/rules/ and .claude/skills/learned/), never global. Agentboard patterns are project-specific and would confuse agents in other projects.

Global database at ~/.agentboard/agentboard.db shared by all projects. CLI works from anywhere. Per-project state (worktrees, logs, config, memory) stays in repo's .agentboard/. Projects indexed by projects table.

PM writes detailed spec via guided UI (6 sections). AI spec-generator removed. After AI planning, task pauses at needs_plan_review for engineer approval. Pipeline: spec_review → planning → needs_plan_review → implementing.

Superpowers-inspired pipeline rewrite: conversational spec building, automated spec review, bite-sized TDD subtasks (2-10), single-shot implementation (no ralph loop), inline fix (1 attempt then escalate), per-subtask code quality review, holistic final review, opus everywhere.

Per-stage --tools lists instead of blanket --permission-mode acceptEdits. Read-only (Read, Glob, Grep) for review/planning stages. Full-access (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep) for implementing/inline_fix. Centralized in src/worker/stage-tools.ts. Principle of least privilege.

Subtask stale object pattern: Never trust in-memory task state after any async operation. Always re-fetch from DB before making decisions based on task status. Origin: checkAndUpdateParentStatus used stale task.status from claim time. Apply in: src/worker/loop.ts, any code passing task through multiple async operations, parent/child status resolution.

Subtask shared worktree pattern: Subtasks share parent's worktree and branch. listGitRefsByTask(subtaskId) returns nothing — fall back to listGitRefsByTask(parentId). Skip PR creation for subtasks. Subtasks commit to parent's branch. On subtask failure, cancel remaining backlog siblings. Apply in: pr-creator.ts, loop.ts, any new stages interacting with git.

Causal link: The 'serial subtasks' decision (ADR-004) directly shapes src/worker/stages/implementer.ts behavior. Subtasks execute serially, not in parallel. Implementer processes one subtask at a time within parent's worktree.

Causal link: The 'prepared statements' convention drives all DB queries in src/db/queries.ts. Never use string interpolation in SQL. All queries use parameterized prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.

Causal link: The 'execFile not exec' convention shapes src/worker/executor.ts. All shell commands use execFile (promisified) with argument arrays, never exec with string concatenation. Prevents command injection.

Subtasks go ready→implement→checks→inline_fix→code_quality→done|failed|blocked. No spec, no planning, no PR. Per-subtask code quality review catches issues early. Subtask quality depends on parent's spec quality.

PM chats with AI via SSE streaming endpoint for spec building. After AI planning, task pauses at needs_plan_review for engineer to review/edit/approve. Rejection sends back to planning with feedback. Pipeline: spec_review→planning→needs_plan_review→implementing.

Ruflo v3.5 with all features: hooks, 12 daemon workers, HNSW memory, 3 neural models, AI defense, GitHub integration, swarm coordination, 4 workflow templates. Enabled by default via ruflo.enabled in .agentboard/config.json.

Never trust in-memory task state after any async operation. Always re-fetch from DB before making decisions based on task status. Origin: checkAndUpdateParentStatus used stale task.status from claim time.
Subtasks share parent's worktree and branch. git ref lookups must fall back to parent. Subtasks never create PRs. When subtask fails, cancel remaining backlog siblings to unblock parent resolution.
